Nutritional Range – Franchise Available Across AP

Nutritional & Energy Supplement Pharma Franchise in Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma offers a pharma franchise for the nutritional and energy supplement range across Andhra Pradesh. Crasenim-LC — combining Mecobalamin 1500mcg, Folic Acid 1.5mg, and L-Carnitine 500mg — addresses peripheral neuropathy, chronic fatigue, and cellular energy deficiency with a clinically relevant, once-daily formulation.

💊 Mecobalamin 1500mcg + L-Carnitine + Folic Acid ✅ WHO GMP Certified 📍 AP-wide franchise available
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
Market Opportunity

Nutritional Supplements: Growing Prescriptions Across AP

The nutritional supplement segment is one of the fastest-growing areas in Indian pharma — driven by growing awareness of B12 deficiency (especially in vegetarian-heavy AP diet patterns), rising diabetes-associated neuropathy, and increased patient demand for energy and fatigue management solutions.

Mecobalamin (active B12) with L-Carnitine and Folic Acid is a clinically well-accepted combination prescribed by neurologists, diabetologists, orthopaedic surgeons, gynaecologists, and general physicians. The broad prescribing base makes it an excellent franchise add-on to any existing pharma portfolio in AP.

  • Mecobalamin deficiency is highly prevalent in AP's largely vegetarian population
  • Diabetic neuropathy drives strong co-prescription with antidiabetics
  • L-Carnitine addresses fatigue in post-illness and nutritional deficiency cases
  • Wide prescriber base: neurologists, GPs, diabetologists, orthopaedics, gynaecologists
  • Strong counter demand — patients often self-purchase once initially prescribed
  • Growing urban awareness of wellness supplementation drives new patient initiations
Nutritional Product

Crasenim-LC – Mecobalamin, Folic Acid & L-Carnitine

Crasenim-LC
Mecobalamin 1500mcg Folic Acid 1.5mg L-Carnitine 500mg WHO GMP Certified
Franchise Available

Clinical Indications

  • Peripheral neuropathy (diabetic, nutritional, post-infectious)
  • Chronic fatigue syndrome and muscular weakness
  • Anaemia associated with B12 or folate deficiency
  • Muscle cramps and recovery support
  • Neurological health maintenance in at-risk patients

Key Clinical Benefits

  • Mecobalamin (active B12) — superior neuroregenerative properties vs cyanocobalamin
  • L-Carnitine — mitochondrial energy production for cellular energy
  • Folic Acid — essential co-factor in nerve and cell regeneration
  • Once-daily convenience — high patient compliance
Franchise

Nutritional Range Territory

Strong add-on franchise product for anyone already holding cardiac or diabetic range territories. Mecobalamin supplements generate consistent repeat prescriptions and strong pharmacy counter movement.

Commission MR

Promote Crasenim-LC to neurologists, diabetologists, physicians, and gynaecologists. A broad-specialist product that complements other therapeutic detailing in your AP territory.

Stockist

Supplement Distribution

Nutritional supplements have excellent retail pharmacy movement. Stock Crasenim-LC for steady counter-prescription and emerging self-purchase demand across AP.

FAQs

Nutritional Range Franchise – FAQ

Why is Mecobalamin preferred over regular B12 (Cyanocobalamin)?
Mecobalamin is the active, neurologically bioavailable form of Vitamin B12. Unlike Cyanocobalamin, which requires conversion in the body, Mecobalamin directly supports nerve regeneration and myelin synthesis — making it the preferred form for neurological indications including diabetic neuropathy and peripheral nerve damage.
Is the nutritional range a good standalone franchise or only a complement?
Crasenim-LC works well both standalone and as a complement to existing franchise portfolios. It's particularly powerful as an add-on for franchise partners already holding diabetic or cardiac range rights, since GPs prescribe Crasenim-LC alongside antidiabetics and antihypertensives in the same patient consultation.
How do I enquire about the nutritional range franchise in Andhra Pradesh?
WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 or fill the form on our Franchise page. Mention "nutritional range" and your preferred district in AP.
